name: @misty-step/aesthetic
note: The composition feed: every catalog primitive with its canonical markup, the recipes it needs, and the law it must hold. Generated from site/primitives.html (the catalog is the source of truth). To compose a view: include aesthetic.css + recipes/recipes.js, paste the markup you need, steer --ae-accent, and never violate the law below.

law.size: Exactly one font size on every surface; the headline is heavier and blacker, never larger.
law.registers: Three inks by three weights (400 / 550 / 800): nine registers.
law.accent: The accent is yours: define your scheme and use it with judgment. Identity comes from ink, hairlines, type, and motion — never from a color-counting rule. Color earns its place; it is not ambient.
law.status: Status rides the glyph: danger, success, and warning color the icon, never the sentence, never a filled pill.
law.layout: Every view fits the viewport. 100dvh screens, no page scrolling; a quiet nav swaps views when content exceeds one screen.
law.motion: Motion is feedback, never decoration: small, brief, eased, and gone under prefers-reduced-motion. State resolutions are gentler and resolve once; success persists, nothing changes size.
law.modes: Light and dark, defaulting to the system, with a user toggle. The change itself is one soft 700ms breath (view transition), uniform color ease where unsupported.
law.steering: Downstream projects steer the scheme: --ae-accent / --ae-accent-dark, and the status triplet when the domain needs different hues. Everything else is the shared identity.
law.buttons: Buttons are not links: contained ink shapes, solid primary and hairline secondary.

primitives.title: Screen
primitives.summary: One viewport, never scrolling: a bar, a centered stage, a bar. Add .ae-wide to the screen for the 68rem catalog measure.

primitives.title: Stage scroll
primitives.summary: For genuinely long documents: the document scrolls inside the stage, the chrome stays put, the page itself never scrolls.
primitives.markup:
<main class="ae-stage ae-stage-scroll">
  <article>…the long document…</article>
</main>

primitives.title: Nav
primitives.summary: Quiet words with a sliding ink underline. Views remount on swap and replay their entrance.
primitives.note:
the site positions the indicator
(left/width) on view change

primitives.title: Row link
primitives.summary: In lists, the whole row is the link — the cursor never strobes across dead bands between rows.
primitives.markup: A project that matters — and its description

primitives.title: Chrome
primitives.summary: The one sanctioned second size: 13px, muted ink, for footers, utility links, and metadata.
primitives.markup: v2.8.1 · MIT githubnpm

primitives.title: Icon
primitives.summary: Lucide, inlined as SVG symbols: 1.5px stroke, round caps, sized to ride with text. The mode toggle rotate-crossfades sun and moon.
primitives.markup:
<button class="ae-mode" aria-label="toggle color mode">
  <svg class="ae-icon ae-sun">…sun…</svg>
  <svg class="ae-icon ae-moon">…moon…</svg>
</button>
primitives.note:
toggle .dark/.light on the root;
pin style.colorScheme to match

primitives.title: Panel
primitives.summary: Soft depth for genuinely dense content: light shadow in light mode, wash in dark, radius 0. Forms on a stage stay naked.
primitives.markup: …dense content…

primitives.title: Registers
primitives.summary: Hierarchy is ink and weight, never scale. Faint ink is decoration only — placeholders and resting underlines.
primitives.markup:

The argument, plainly.

primitives.title: Input
primitives.summary: A line, not a box. Placeholders are decorative supplements to always-visible labels.
primitives.markup:
<label class="ae-label" for="name">Name</label>
<input class="ae-input" id="name" type="text">

<textarea class="ae-input"></textarea>

primitives.title: Button
primitives.summary: Contained ink shapes with a small press — links navigate, buttons act. The send moment resolves exactly once; success persists and the control disables.

primitives.title: Status
primitives.summary: Status rides the glyph: success, warning, and danger color the icon — never the sentence, never a filled pill. The words stay ink.
primitives.markup:
Deploy succeeded.

Certificate expires soon.

Build failed.

primitives.title: Table
primitives.summary: Terminal density: 13px mono, lowercase headers on a wash band, hairline row rules — framed as a numbered plate. A column header shares its column's alignment: put .num on the th AND its tds.
primitives.markup:

primitives.title: Dialog
primitives.summary: The panel costume in the top layer: a decision asked in a soft-depth panel over a whisper of paper dim. Escape and the quiet button decline it. Pair with <dialog> + showModal().
primitives.markup:
Archive this project?

It leaves the index but keeps its history.
primitives.note:
open with dialog.showModal();
both actions close()

primitives.title: Settings
primitives.summary: A quiet hairline row — label left, current value right; activating it folds a chooser open beneath. Choosing writes the value and folds the menu; one row open at a time.
primitives.markup: …more rows…
primitives.note:
recipes.js wires the fold, the choice,
and the written value

primitives.title: Choice
primitives.summary: Choice marks are squares — a circle would be the only curve in the system, so there isn't one. The checkbox fills with ink and draws its check in surface; the radio holds an ink core; the switch slides an ink thumb along a hairline channel. State reads from position and fill, never from a green pill.
primitives.markup:
<label class="ae-choice">
  <input class="ae-check" type="checkbox" />
  Email me on deploy
</label>

<label class="ae-choice">
  <input class="ae-radio" type="radio" name="vis" />
  Public
</label>

<label class="ae-choice">
  <input class="ae-switch" type="checkbox" />
  Auto-deploy
</label>

primitives.title: Validation
primitives.summary: Validation keeps the status law: the field's own line confesses in the status hue, the glyph carries it in the note, and the sentence stays ink.
primitives.markup: Not a valid address.

primitives.title: Tabs
primitives.summary: The nav instrument pointed at panels instead of views: the same quiet words, the same sliding ink underline, aria-selected marking the open one. Panels are views — remount to replay the entrance.
primitives.markup: …

primitives.title: Tag
primitives.summary: The badge, refused. A tag is a word in the plate-caption voice — mono, spaced, hairline at most, never a filled pill. If a tag needs status, the glyph rides beside the word.
primitives.markup: rust v1.18
primitives.note: status joins as a glyph, never a fill: deployed

primitives.title: Tooltip
primitives.summary: A whisper that answers hover: chrome-register words in a hairline slip, pure CSS. Patience built in — it waits a beat on hover and answers focus at once. Keep the words short; anything longer belongs in the prose.
primitives.markup: chrome register

primitives.title: Popover
primitives.summary: The popover: a slip of surface anchored to its invoker, hairline frame, soft depth, no dim. The native popover attribute owns the top layer, light dismiss, and Escape; the recipe only does the geometry.

primitives.title: Toast
primitives.summary: News arrives at the edge and waits to be read: a slip with the status on its glyph, stacked bottom-right. It persists until dismissed or pushed out — never an anxious timer by default.

primitives.title: Fold
primitives.summary: Disclosure as a hairline row — native details in the settings costume. The mono plus quarter-turns into a close; that turn is the feedback, once per action.
primitives.markup:
What does the import cost?

One request, one file…

primitives.title: Breadcrumbs
primitives.summary: The path, in the chrome register: here is ink, the way back is muted, the separators are faint.
primitives.markup:
1. projects
  2. canary
  3. deploys

primitives.title: Waiting
primitives.summary: Waiting is still wash, never a shimmer — motion is feedback and waiting is not an action; the view's entrance acknowledges arrival. Absence is an honest sentence with one quiet action, not an illustration party.
primitives.markup:

primitives.note:
waiting: blocks hold the layout, words go to a status line
absence: an honest sentence, one quiet action

primitives.title: Meter
primitives.summary: The gauge is a ruled line, never a glowing pill: a wash channel, an ink fill, hairline threshold ticks. The fill takes a status ink only when the level is the signal. Width changes are state resolutions — gentle, once.
primitives.note: the fill takes a status ink only when the level IS the signal:

primitives.title: Figures
primitives.summary: Figures are tabular numerals that tick without jitter. The hero figure is 800 and isolated — never larger: the instrument reads loud through weight, not scale. Deltas put the hue on the arrow; trends are pen strokes, no axes, no area fill.
primitives.markup: 48,211 4.2%

primitives.title: Interval
primitives.summary: The interval is the meter with a spread: a ruled track carrying a [lo,hi] range band and a mean tick, so a score reads as a level and its confidence at once. Where two bands share a column the lead is inside the spread — the certification read. The band draws in once from the mean; hover (or focus) a track for the exact figures. Every mark is a rectangle, so radius 0 holds.
primitives.markup: μ 86.9 [83.1, 90.7]
primitives.note: the no-fill variant: a lo→hi rule with end caps

primitives.title: Plot
primitives.summary: The plane draws two dimensions at once: cost against quality, the candidates as round dots, the Pareto frontier — nobody both cheaper and better — as a dashed guide. Like the spark, the kit dresses a consumer-authored SVG; the dots are the pen, so radius 0 still governs the frame, axes, and ticks. The default composition is the frontier: the pick is the lone accent dot, the dominated drop to faint. The parts compose — an open .ae-plot-ring marks a reference baseline, a colored .ae-plot-glyph sits where a gate-failed datum would (status rides the glyph).
primitives.markup:
<svg class="ae-plot" viewBox="0 0 440 360" role="img">
  <path class="ae-plot-axis" d="M 46 16 L 46 320 L 422 320"/>
  <path class="ae-plot-frontier" d="M 100 206 L 186 100 L 358 46"/>
  <circle class="ae-plot-dot is-chosen" cx="186" cy="100" r="4.5"/>
  <circle class="ae-plot-dot is-dominated" cx="239" cy="153" r="4.5"/>
primitives.note:
a gate-failed datum: status rides the glyph
  <g class="ae-plot-glyph ae-err">…</g>
</svg>

primitives.title: Flow
primitives.summary: The flow draws a system: hairline-framed stages (hard corners, radius 0) joined by orthogonal ink wires, so a pipeline reads as a diagram. State rides the frame and a glyph — a cleared stage carries ✓, the running stage takes the accent, locked stages go dashed-faint. Like the plot, the kit dresses a consumer-authored SVG so nodes and wires share one coordinate space, and non-scaling strokes hold the hairline at any fit. The default is the spine — the gate/lineage backbone; the same nodes compose into stations, ported nodes, or a branching DAG.
primitives.markup:
<svg class="ae-flow" viewBox="0 0 684 140" role="img">
  <path class="ae-wire is-active" d="M 138 70 L 194 70"/>
  <rect class="ae-node is-done" x="18" y="43" width="120" height="54"/>
  <text class="ae-node-label" x="78" y="80">arena</text>
  <path class="ae-icon ae-ok" d="M 117 54 L 120 57 L 126 49"/>
  <rect class="ae-node is-active" x="194" y="43" …/>
  <rect class="ae-node is-locked" x="370" y="43" …/>
</svg>

primitives.title: App shell
primitives.summary: The app shell: one viewport, hairline-divided — a 13px rail for places, a desk for work. The desk scrolls inside itself; the page never moves. See it composed: the dashboard gauntlet.
primitives.markup:
PLACES

primitives.title: Document
primitives.summary: The document archetype: rendered markdown drops in unclassed. Headings are weight, never size; rules are hairlines; quotes are inset. See it composed: the docs gauntlet.
primitives.markup:
Install

Pin the tag; upgrades are deliberate.

One request, one file…
pnpm add …
primitives.note: markdown output needs no classes inside

primitives.title: Report
primitives.summary: The report sub-registers: opt-in additions for a generated document that is read and shared — all weight, space, and hairlines, never a new size or a serif. A <figure> in a doc auto-numbers (FIG n); the lede lifts the standfirst to a way in; the findings box is a hairline frame (never a filled card) with the recommendation on the one accent rule; the pull-quote is the closest call to the one-size law, held on the right side of it. The plain .ae-doc stays the default.
primitives.markup: … the conclusion, up front …
primitives.note: the

primitives.title: Screen reader
primitives.summary: Present to assistive tech, invisible on paper: live regions and labels the layout has no room to speak. The send recipe uses one to announce the resolved state.
primitives.note:
recipes/send.js writes "Sent" into it
when the send moment resolves
